title: oenanthe fistulosa var. tabernaemontana
intro: Oenanthe fistulosa var. tabernaemontana, also known as Water Celery, is a variety of plant in the family Apiaceae, native to Asia and Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Oenanthe fistulosa var. tabernaemontana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support liver function. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in herbal medicine in the form of capsules or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
